review_text: This serum has completely transformed my skin. Dark spots are visibly fading after just three weeks of use.
The texture is very sticky and takes forever to absorb. Leaves a greasy film on my face all day.
Great results for brightening but the smell is quite strong and chemical-like. Not pleasant to use daily.
Ordered twice already. My skin tone has evened out significantly and I get compliments constantly now.
The bottle pump stopped working after a week. Had to pry it open to get the product out. Poor design.
After two months of consistent use my fine lines are noticeably reduced. Best anti-ageing product I've tried.
Caused severe redness and peeling on my sensitive skin even at the lowest concentration. Very disappointing.
Decent product but extremely overpriced compared to similar retinol creams available at the pharmacy.
The packaging is luxurious and the cream feels rich without being heavy. Absorbs beautifully overnight.
I reached out about a reaction I had and the team responded within an hour with a full refund. Exceptional service.
Lightweight and deeply hydrating. My dry skin drinks it up and stays plump all day. Repurchasing for sure.
Broke me out badly after just two days of use. Had to stop immediately. Not suitable for acne-prone skin.
The 30ml bottle is tiny for the price they charge. Ran out in three weeks using it twice daily.
Delivery arrived damaged — the seal was broken and the cream had leaked inside the box. Unhygienic.
Absolutely no scent, non-greasy, and layers well under SPF. Exactly what a good moisturiser should be.
Leaves a horrible white cast on my medium skin tone. Looks ghostly under any lighting. Unusable.
Lightweight formula that disappears into skin with no cast. Finally an SPF I actually enjoy wearing.
Took 14 days to arrive and the expiry date was only 4 months away. Logistics need serious improvement.
Good sun protection and doesn't pill under makeup. The packaging is sleek and travel-friendly too.
Price jumped 25% since my last order with zero change in formula or packaging. Feels like a money grab.
Pores look visibly smaller after two weeks. Skin feels balanced and less oily throughout the day.
The dropper leaks every time I use it. Half the product has been wasted soaking into the box. Infuriating.
Good ingredients but the alcohol content is too high for my dry skin. Feels very stripping after use.
Asked customer care about combining this with retinol and they gave me a detailed, helpful response same day.
Reasonable price for the size and quality. Much better value than the high-end brands with similar ingredients.
Instant plumping effect after just one use. Skin looks dewy and refreshed for about 48 hours after.
The mask slides off my face constantly during the 20-minute application. Very poorly fitted and frustrating.
Received the wrong variant — ordered brightening but got the anti-ageing version. Completely different product.
Individually wrapped masks are a nice touch and the packaging feels premium for the price point.
No visible results even after using the full box of six masks. Did not do anything it claimed on the box.
